decision: Supersede MainRegimeV2 demotion wording. Treat BullExpansion, BearExpansion, SidewaysConsolidation, CrisisCrash, and Manipulation as active main roots or root-or-overlay labels. Existing sub-signatures remain evidence features unless reissued through a source-backed root gate.
